title: tabernaemontana continentalis
intro: Tabernaemontana continentalis, also known as the Yellow Formosana or Yellow Formosan Tree, is a plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and sedative effects. The health benefits of Tabernaemontana continentalis include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and muscle spasms, as well as potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety in modern medicine.
